keyValues.global.application.setting.name: Global application settings
keyValues.global.application.setting.description: Controls the public URLs used by application services.
keyValues.global.application.setting.input.invalid: Invalid global application settings data was provided.
keyValues.global.application.setting.s3.service.ur: Public base URL used to access files stored in S3.
The S3 service URL is not configured. Configure it in the global application settings.
keyValues.global.application.setting.api.service.u: Public base URL of the application API.
keyValues.global.application.setting.app.service.u: Public base URL of the client application.
The application URL is not configured. Configure it in the global application settings.
